exemptions.reason: Interactive TTY prompts via readline; result routes through Ink CommandResult.
Interactive TTY confirmation before destructive clear.
Interactive TTY confirmation and progress notes via injectable writer.
Shell completion script is the command output surface.
Host-owned implementation of cli.emitJson / emitEnvelope / emitError.
Parent-child runtime probe IPC wire on stdout.
Aux export preset: one-line file-write confirmation; --json uses cli.emitJson.
Aux export/list presets: status confirmations and lookup queries own IO.
Read-only catalog lookup; --json machine path writes structured query result.
One-line symbol-index write confirmation after file export.
Shard worker parent-child IPC on stdout.
Internal CI equivalence gate owns stdout report and exit code.

localAllowlists.name: CONFIG_READER_ALLOWLIST
localAllowlists.reason: One-config-document ratchet must explicitly name sanctioned YAML reader bridge files.

localAllowlists.name: DIRECT_JSON_STDOUT_ALLOWLIST
localAllowlists.reason: Runtime-boundary check must name worker/transport JSON stdout exceptions.

localAllowlists.name: EXEMPT
localAllowlists.reason: Pre-action hook is the documented pre-scope logger bridge.

localAllowlists.name: ALLOWLISTED_BASENAMES
localAllowlists.reason: Environment governance needs explicit pre-scope and registry primitive readers.

localAllowlists.name: EXEMPT_BASENAMES
localAllowlists.reason: Graph signal identity guard excludes the factory and rule infrastructure files it validates.

localAllowlists.name: ALLOWLISTED_BASENAMES
localAllowlists.reason: Heap preflight may own early process diagnostics before command seams are available.

localAllowlists.name: EXEMPT_PATH
localAllowlists.reason: Module-level run-state guard excludes documented infrastructure containers, not run values.

localAllowlists.name: EXEMPT_BY_FILE
localAllowlists.reason: Module singleton guard has documented ADR-0023 registry/container exemptions.

localAllowlists.name: EPHEMERAL_OR_DIAGNOSTIC_ALLOWLIST
localAllowlists.reason: Raw fs artifact guard excludes live/diagnostic/transport paths that are not durable artifacts.

localAllowlists.name: BOOTSTRAP_EXEMPT
localAllowlists.reason: ToolCliContext seam guard excludes the host composition root that implements the seams.

localAllowlists.name: ALLOWED_GIT_PATTERNS
localAllowlists.reason: Changed-file resolver guard permits unrelated git metadata probes.

localAllowlists.name: ALLOWLIST
localAllowlists.reason: stderr command-error guard excludes progress, warning, and worker transport channels.
